# Factory

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Factory;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Factory { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
building, business, energy, industry, manufacture, sector

## Categories
buildings, navigation
